steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request correction of Nokia Oyj dividend withholding from 13.5% to 15% under FI-NO treaty
Submit formal refund claim to Vero (Finnish Tax Administration) using Form 6163e/6167e for the EUR 3,607.50 overpayment
Provide Nordea with Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement documentation showing 15% rate applies to Norwegian residents
Follow up with custodian for automatic correction of future Nokia dividend payments to prevent recurrence

references.title: Vero – Refund Application (Form 6163e + 6167e for corps, 6164e for individuals)
